chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-1162 of 2019 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA No.5950/2019 2. For hearing of main case 25.2.2025 Mr. Shamshad Ali Qureshi advocate for the petitioner Ms. Nazia Siddiqui advocate for the respondent-KDA This petition seeks to assert proprietary rights in respect of immoveable property and seeks demarcation etc. therein. The same is not amenable in writ jurisdiction. Even otherwise the petitioner seeks relief in the nature of a harassment petition which has been deprecated by a Division Bench of this Court in PLD 2019 Sindh 168. In view of the foregoing, this petition is dismissed. Judge Judge Zahid/*
